title: Test Stone Golem: 088-E03 MOVE_CARD

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Summon this card to your opponent's side of the field. This card becomes a permanent creature for the game's duration. Return your opponent's primary creature back to their deck (Shuffle). This card loses 10 HP at the beginning of your turn.

plan.title: Test Stone Golem: 088-E03 MOVE_CARD
plan.summary: Create a deterministic dev scenario for Stone Golem and verify that 088-E03 MOVE_CARD resolves according to the parsed effect and WARD rules. Assertions were tightened from the printed card text for headless QA.

notes: Rules text: when Stone Golem is summoned to the opponent side, return the opponent primary creature to their deck and shuffle.
Player 2 starts with a primary creature that should be returned to deck.

steps: Resolve the on-summon return of Player 2 primary creature to deck.
Verify Stone Golem placement and the previous primary creature zone.

expectedAssertions.label: Stone Golem occupies opponent field after summon

manualVerification: Confirm the deck is shuffled after the returned primary creature is moved.
riskNotes: Fallback plan cannot infer every WARD edge case.
The engine remains source of truth; the LLM/fallback only proposes a QA plan.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run the generated scenario and update after reviewing result.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
